name: 保利· 德卢卡
name_full: 保利· 德卢卡 Paoli De Luca
introduction: Paoli De Luca (1999) was born in Naples and attended the Accademia di Belle Arti, where they developed their fotoromanzo Fera (2018), which debuted at the Naples Film Festival. They have collaborated with Vogue Italia, Harper’s Bazaar, and the MACRO Museum in Rome. In 2021, they wrote and directed Echi, which was screened at the Cineteca di Bologna. They are currently studying Filmmaking at the CSC in Rome. Their short feature Star (2024) was screened at Cinema Troisi, while Marina (2025) is their latest work.
